summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Social Community feature for Cosmic Zen app. All backend APIs working correctly, frontend UI rendering properly with feed, sidebar, and navigation. Authentication, post creation, and community interactions tested successfully.

minor_issues.issue: Timeout on user registration (likely due to existing user)
minor_issues.impact: Low - login works fine as fallback

interaction_issues.issue: Like button click may not show immediate visual feedback, comment section may not open consistently
User session appears to expire during testing, causing logout

passed_tests: GET /api/community/feed returns posts with total count
POST /api/community/posts creates posts successfully
POST /api/community/posts/{id}/like toggles likes
POST /api/community/posts/{id}/comment adds comments
GET /api/community/posts/{id}/comments returns comment lists
DELETE /api/community/posts/{id} deletes own posts
POST /api/community/follow/{user_id} toggles follow status
GET /api/community/profile/{user_id} returns public profiles with stats
GET /api/community/me/following returns followed user IDs
GET /api/community/users/active returns active community members
Community page loads with 'Collective Consciousness' heading
Social feed displays existing posts with user avatars and post types
Post cards show like count and comment count buttons
Community Pulse sidebar shows total posts and active members
Active Seekers sidebar shows user cards
Navigation includes Community link
Landing page includes Community feature card
Share button appears when signed in
Create post form opens and works correctly
Different post types (thought, affirmation, milestone) display correctly
Post creation adds new posts to feed
Community stats update correctly
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor fixes needed: 1) Improve like/comment button responsiveness and visual feedback, 2) Investigate session timeout issues during community interactions, 3) Consider adding loading states for better UX during API calls
